title: OUAS Layout Config
description: A declarative JSON document that an AI agent writes to define what a user's screen should look like. It specifies which components appear, in what order, with what data fields visible. It contains no code and does not modify the app — it is pure view data.

ouas_version.description: The OUAS specification version this config conforms to.

config_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific config.

app_id.description: The app_id this config targets. Must match the app's manifest app_id. (Validation step 2)

user_id.description: The user this config belongs to. Configs are per-user, not per-app.

manifest_version.description: The manifest_version this config was written against. The renderer uses this to detect version mismatches and trigger config migration.

created_by_agent.description: Identifier of the AI agent that generated this config.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this config was generated.

description.description: Human-readable description of this layout's intent.
examples: Email as task list for busy executive

layout.description: The layout definition — specifies component regions and their configuration.

theme.description: Optional theme overrides for density and accent color.

type.description: The layout type. Determines how regions are arranged.

regions.description: Array of region definitions. Each region places and configures one component.

id.description: Unique identifier for this region within the layout.

component.description: The component ID to render in this region. Must exist in the app's manifest. (Validation step 3)

variant.description: Which variant of the component to render. Must be one of the component's declared variants.

visible_fields.description: Fields to pass as props to the component. Each must exist in the component's manifest. Required fields must be included. (Validation steps 4-5)

hidden_fields.description: Fields explicitly hidden. Informational only — the renderer uses visible_fields as the source of truth.

sort.description: How to sort the data before rendering.

filter.description: How to filter the data before rendering. Null means no filter.

slots.description: Map of slot names to component IDs that should fill those slots.

position.description: Absolute position hint for floating components.

value.description: Value to compare against. Type must match the field's type.

accent_color.description: Optional accent color override as hex. Null uses app default.
